title: 信息日报 2026-07-12

headline.title: GPT-5.6系列发布：Luna、Terra、Sol三大模型细节公开
headline.summary: OpenAI最新旗舰模型GPT-5.6系列正式上线，分为Luna（低成本）、Terra（均衡）和Sol（最强）三种规格，每百万token价格依次为1/6美元、2.5/15美元、5/30美元。相比Claude Opus系列，价格更具竞争力，同时在网络安全等多方面有改进。
headline.title_en: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
headline.summary_en: OpenAI's latest flagship model family GPT-5.6 is now generally available in three sizes: Luna, Terra, and Sol. Pricing per 1M input/output tokens: $1/$6, $2.50/$15, $5/$30 respectively. The models promise improvements across cybersecurity and other areas, positioning competitively against Claude Opus.
headline.original_title: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
headline.reason: 该文章提供了GPT-5.6系列最详细的定价与规格对比，是当日AI领域最受关注的技术发布，直接影响开发者选型和企业采购决策。
headline.reason_en: This article provides the most detailed pricing and specification comparison for the GPT-5.6 family, the most anticipated AI release of the day, directly impacting developer choices and enterprise purchasing decisions.
